chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.S-39 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. FRESH CASE 1.For orders on CMA 105/25 2.For orders on CMA 106/25 3.For hearing of main case 07-03-2025 None present for the Petitioner. **** None present for the petitioner; no intimation is received. This petition is filed in respect of harassment. However perusal of record reflects that the petitioner has already availed remedy before the Justice of Peace, where favorable order was passed. Under the circumstances, no writ can be issued. Accordingly, instant petition is dismissed along with listed application(s). JUDGE Ahmad
